application.doc: Update the current distributed session cache policy

param.name: appliance_hostname
param.doc: Host name of the appliance.

method.name: PUT
method.id: Update the current distributed session cache policy
method.doc: The system provides a distributed session cache which allows sessions to be shared amongst multiple servers. To update the current distributed session cache policy issue a HTTP PUT request against the distributed session cache URI. Please note that this Web service is only available when Verify Identity Access is run under Docker.

param.name: Authorization
param.doc: Basic Authentication header

param.name: Accept:application/json
param.doc: Required for requests to the service

param.name: trace_level
param.doc: The configured trace level for the session cache. A value of 0 disables tracing.

param.name: worker_threads
param.doc: The number of worker threads allocated to processing requests.

param.name: max_session_lifetime
param.doc: The maximum lifetime (in seconds) of any session stored by the DSC.

param.name: max_session_list
param.doc: The maximum number of sessions to return when a "listSessions" request is made to the DSC. Note this may have an impact on performance.

param.name: client_grace
param.doc: The length of time (in seconds) that a client (aka WebSEAL) has to reconnect before sessions owned by that client are discarded.

param.name: connection_idle_timeout
param.doc: The maximum length of time that a connection from a client can remain idle before it is closed by the server. A value of 0 indicates that connections will not be reused. The default value is 0.

param.name: service_port
param.doc: The port number on which the DSC will listen for requests.

param.name: replication_port
param.doc: The port number on which the DSC will listen for replication requests.

param.name: ssl_ciphers
param.doc: The comma separated list of permitted SSL algorithms for TLS connections to the DSC. Valid values include "RSA_WITH_SHA224", "RSA_WITH_SHA256", "RSA_WITH_SHA384", "RSA_WITH_SHA512", "ECDSA_WITH_SHA224", "ECDSA_WITH_SHA256", "ECDSA_WITH_SHA384", and "ECDSA_WITH_SHA512".

param.name: tls12_cipher_specs
param.doc: Comma separated list of TLS1.3 cipher specs permitted for encrypting TLS connections to the DSC. Valid values include "TLS_RSA_WITH_NULL_NULL", "TLS_DHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256", "TLS_DHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384", "TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA", "TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA", "TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_128_CCM_8", "TLS_RSA_WITH_NULL_SHA256", "TLS_RSA_WITH_NULL_SHA", "TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_NULL_SHA", "TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_NULL_SHA", "TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CCM", "TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CCM", "TLS_DHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CCM", "TLS_DHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CCM", "TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CCM_8", "TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CCM_8", "TLS_DHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CCM_8", "TLS_DHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CCM_8", "TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_CHACHA20_POLY1305_SHA256", "TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_CHACHA20_POLY1305_SHA256", "TLS_DHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA256", "TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256", "TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256", "TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384", "TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA256", "TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA256", "TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA", "TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA", "TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA", "TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA", "TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA256", "TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA384", "TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA256", "TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA384", "TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384", "TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256" and "TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384".

param.name: tls13_cipher_specs
param.doc: Comma separated list of TLS1.2 cipher specs permitted for encrypting TLS connections to the DSC. Valid values include "TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256", "TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384", "TLS_CHACHA20_POLY1305_SHA256", "TLS_AES_128_CCM_SHA256" and "TLS_AES_128_CCM_8_SHA256".

param.name: ssl_key_agreement
param.doc: The type of algorithms and parameters that are used for TLS key agreement. Valid values include "hybrid-pqc-supported", "nonhybrid-pqc-supported", "provider-default", "custom".

param.name: ssl_supported_groups
param.doc: Comma separated list of supported elliptic curve groups for key exchange in SSL/TLS connections to the DSC. This parameter is required if ssl_key_agreement is set to "custom". Valid values include "ECDHE_X25519MLKEM768", "ECDHE_X25519", "ECDHE_SecP256r1MLKEM768", "ECDHE_SECP256R1", "ECDHE_SecP384r1MLKEM1024", "ECDHE_SECP384R1", "ECDHE_SECP521R1", "ECDHE_X448", "MLKEM768", "MLKEM1024".

param.name: allow_rsa_key_exchange
param.doc: A flag true/false indicating whether RSA key exchange is allowed for SSL/TLS connections to the DSC.

param.name: servers
param.doc: The external connection data for each instance of the DSC. This corresponds to the IP address and ports to which clients will connect. Up to 4 servers may be defined (primary, secondary, tertiary and quaternary). The role of the server will be determined by the order of elements within the servers array.

param.name: ip
param.doc: The name/IP address over which clients can connect to the DSC.

param.name: service_port
param.doc: The port which can be used by clients to connect to the DSC for session requests. This can be different to the 'service_port' on which the DSC listens due to the port mapping capability of Docker.

param.name: replication_port
param.doc: The port which can be used by the DSC to replicate data to a replication DSC. This can be different to the 'replication_port' on which the DSC listens due to the port mapping capability of Docker.

param.name: Content-Type:application/json
param.doc: Response is in JSON formatting

response.doc: There is a problem with the request. The JSON message describes the problem.

param.name: Content-Type:application/json
param.doc: Response is in JSON formatting

param.name: message
param.doc: The error message.

response.doc: File not Found, The requested service does not exist. The JSON message indicates which resource.

param.name: Content-Type:application/json
param.doc: Response is in JSON formatting

param.name: message
param.doc: The error message.

response.doc: An internal error occurred. The JSON message indicates the problem.

param.name: Content-Type:application/json
param.doc: Response is in JSON formatting

param.name: message
param.doc: The error message.
